text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Shuka Sho arrives. With sparks of
intense determination flying, Sweep Tosho
clashes with her rivals before the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Triple Tiara tour—and the
last battle Sweep Tosho must overcome to
become the star of her year—is about to begin!
